name: Gaia World Preference
description: Climate preference is determined at the genetic level, and in this case, by accident.
effects: Pop Output on Gaia Worlds: +5% | pc_gaia_habitability: +1.0

name: Ecumenopolis Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, or skillful genetic manipulation.

name: Dry Planet Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by design.

name: Wet Planet Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by design.

name: Cold Planet Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by design.

name: Habitat Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by design.

name: Synaptic Lathe Preference
description: The species is unfit for survival outside of the life support pods of a Synaptic Lathe. They crave a blissful coma, not the relentless assaults of reality.

name: Gaia World Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, or skillful genetic manipulation.

name: Machine World Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, or skillful genetic manipulation.

name: Ring World Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, or skillful genetic manipulation.

name: Ring World Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, or skillful genetic manipulation.

description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, or skillful genetic manipulation.

name: Tomb World Preference
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, or skillful genetic manipulation.

name: Nanite World Habitability
description: This species is well suited to living in a symbiotic relationship with nanite swarms. However their dependence on the nanoforms renders them quite helpless when forced to live in different conditions.

name: Mutagenic Habitability
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, skillful genetic manipulation or, in this case, retroviral agents providing responsive environmental adaptations.
effects: ['concept_automodding_habitability', Auto-Modding Habitability Preference Traits] automatically adjust to the Planet Class a Pops currently lives on.  Mutagenic Habitability picks modifiers from the Mutagenic Habitability Trait List.

name: Wet Climate Mutations
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, skillful genetic manipulation or, in this case, retroviral agents providing responsive environmental adaptations.

name: Cold Climate Mutations
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, skillful genetic manipulation or, in this case, retroviral agents providing responsive environmental adaptations.

description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, skillful genetic manipulation or, in this case, retroviral agents providing responsive environmental adaptations.

name: Synaptic Lathe Mutations
description: Climate preference is determined by eons of evolution, design, skillful genetic manipulation or, in this case, retroviral agents providing responsive environmental adaptations.

name: Hive-Minded
description: This species is made up of semi-autonomous individuals bound up in a single, unfathomably vast consciousness.

name: Machine
description: This species is made up of highly advanced machines.
effects: Starting Age: 5-10 years  - Energy Credits Upkeep per 100 Pops: +$@living_standard_energy_normal|*0$ | pc_machine_habitability: +1; leader_lifespan_add: +20; habitability_floor_add: +0.5 | Triggered: pc_nanotech_habitability: +1

name: Mechanical
description: Mechanical beings are several orders of magnitude more complex than the purpose-built automatons of old, but most possess fairly limited processing capabilities.
effects: Starting Age: 1-10 years  - Energy Credits Upkeep per 100 Pops: +$@living_standard_energy_normal|*0$ | pc_machine_habitability: +1; habitability_floor_add: +0.5

name: Serviles
description: This species evolved alongside a second, more advanced civilization. Never particularly intelligent to begin with, selective breeding for physical prowess and docility has reduced them to servile proles.
effects: Incompatible with Trait: Machine  Cannot generate Leaders Cannot be employed in Elite or Specialist Jobs | pop_happiness: +0.1; worker_and_simple_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult: +10.0%

name: Organic
description: Carbon based lifeforms require a steady diet of nutrients to preserve their biological functions.

name: Lithoid
description: This species has a silicon based biology, and consumes minerals rather than food. They are tougher than traditional organics and have slower metabolisms, making them long lived but slow to reproduce.
effects: Minerals Upkeep per 100 Pops: +$@living_standard_energy_normal|*0$ | logistic_growth_mult: -25.0%; bonus_pop_growth_mult: -25.0%; pop_environment_tolerance: +0.5; army_health: +0.5; leader_lifespan_add: +50 | Triggered: pop_environment_tolerance: +0.5

name: Aquatic
description: This species is perfectly adapted to living in the depths of the ocean. However, on dry land, it is like a fish out of water.
effects: Housing Usage on Ocean worlds and Flooded Habitats: -10%  - Job Efficiency for Workers & Menial Drones on Ocean worlds: +10%  - Housing Usage on non-Wet worlds: +30%  - Habitability on non-Wet worlds: -20%  The Hydrocentric Ascension Perk amplifies this trait's effects. | pc_ocean_habitability: +0.2 | Triggered: is_ideal: False; pop_environment_tolerance: -0.2; is_ideal: False; pop_environment_tolerance: -0.1; pop_environment_tolerance: +0.2

name: Waterproof
description: Initially designed for exploring the ocean's depths, these machines face severe limitations when operating on dry land.  Requires Ocean World homeworld.
effects: Housing Usage on Ocean worlds and Flooded Habitats: -10%  - Job Efficiency for Workers & Menial Drones on Ocean worlds: +10%  - Housing Usage on non-Wet worlds: +30%  - Habitability on non-Wet worlds: -20%  The Hydrocentric Ascension Perk amplifies this trait's effects. | pc_ocean_habitability: +0.2 | Triggered: is_ideal: False; pop_environment_tolerance: -0.2; is_ideal: False; pop_environment_tolerance: -0.1; pop_environment_tolerance: +0.2

name: Necrophage
description: This species of near-immortals procreates by consuming pops of other species.
effects: These Pop Output modifiers do not apply to Hive-minded Pops. | leader_lifespan_add: +80; logistic_growth_mult: -50.0%; bonus_pop_growth_mult: -50.0%; planet_pops_organics_food_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; planet_pops_organics_minerals_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; planet_pops_organics_energy_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; pop_cat_ruler_bonus_workforce_mult: +5.0%; pop_cat_specialist_bonus_workforce_mult: +5.0%; pop_cat_worker_bonus_workforce_mult: -10.0%

name: Clone Soldier
description: Engineered for compliance and war: short-lived, unable to reproduce naturally, and very efficient.

name: Clone Soldier Ascendant
description: Clones at their genetically-engineered peak, with further improved strength, efficiency, durability, and longevity - but forever infertile.

name: Clone Soldier Descendant
description: Once infertile, engineered for compliance and war. Their genetic edge diminished, they are now stable enough for natural reproduction.

name: Cave Dweller
description: This species thrives under the surface of any planet they can inhabit.
effects: Biological Pop Growth Speed: -20% | habitability_floor_add: +0.5; miner_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +15.0%; species_empire_size_mult: +10.0% | Triggered: logistic_growth_mult: -20.0%

name: Molebots
description: These machines are masterfully crafted for cave exploration and mineral extraction, showcasing exceptional maneuverability which enables them to effortlessly traverse through underground spaces.
effects: Pop Assembly Speed: -20% | habitability_floor_add: +0.5; miner_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +15.0%; species_empire_size_mult: +10.0% | Triggered: planet_pop_assembly_mult: -20.0%

name: Shroud-Forged
description: These units have been reshaped by an entity within the Shroud.

name: Perfected Genes
description: Millennia of genetic experimentation and war have led to the creation of a highly resilient species.

name: Starborn
description: This species has always, consciously or not, longed to traverse the void between the stars.

name: Earthbound
description: Members of this species are very possessive of the planets they call home.

name: Natural Intellectuals
description: Members of this species are more philosophically inclined than most.

name: Proles
description: This species has traditionally shunned intellectual pursuits in favor of physical labor.

name: Conservative
description: Members of this species often prefer old wisdom over new experiences.

name: Irradiated
description: This species has evolved to thrive in environments subject to extremely high levels of background radiation.

name: Docile Livestock
description: Docile and delicious, this species has had its higher brain functions genetically altered to create a kind of harmless livestock that can care for itself, without the pesky need for social interaction or self-determination.

name: Forcefully Devolved
description: The brutal devolution process endured by this species had a strong negative impact upon their abilities.

name: Unintelligent
description: This species is unable to complete even the simplest tasks. Their only skill is the incredible speed at which they reproduce.

name: Pre-Sapient
description: Spending a brief time bereft of conscious thought, this species will soon grow up to be a fully sapient being.

name: Vocational Genomics
description: Advanced genetic strings feature epigenetic triggers that adapt to occupational demands, dynamically optimizing gene expression for the host's work environment.
effects: ['concept_automodding_traits', Auto-Modding Traits] automatically adjust to better suit the job that a Pop is currently working.  Vocational Genomics picks modifiers from the Biological Auto-Mod Trait List

name: Agrarian
description: This species has a deep connection to the land, and make expert farmers and gardeners.

name: Ingenious
description: Members of this species are good at 'thinking outside the box' and know how to maximize the efficiency of their infrastructure and power grids.

name: Industrious
description: Members of this species are known for their diligent and hard-working nature, always going above and beyond.

name: Intelligent
description: This species is highly intelligent, and enjoys faster technological progress.

name: Thrifty
description: This species is instinctively economical and is always looking to make a good profit, whatever corners need cutting.

name: Natural Engineers
description: Members of this species have a natural inclination towards engineering and material sciences.

name: Natural Physicists
description: Members of this species have a natural inclination towards theoretical physics and astral phenomena.

name: Natural Sociologists
description: Members of this species have a natural inclination towards sociology and biological studies.

name: Extremely Adaptive
description: This species is remarkably adept at adapting to any foreign environments.

name: Adaptive
description: This species is highly adaptive when it comes to foreign environments.

name: Nonadaptive
description: This species does not adapt well to foreign environments.

name: Rapid Breeders
description: This species reproduces at a very rapid rate, increasing population growth.

name: Slow Breeders
description: This species reproduces at a slow rate, lowering population growth.

name: Talented
description: Member of this species are born with a natural aptitude.

name: Quick Learners
description: Members of this species are quick to learn from their experiences.

name: Slow Learners
description: Members of this species are slow to learn from their experiences.

name: Traditional
description: Certain aspects of this species' cognition make it predisposed toward historical precedence and the value of collective unity.

name: Quarrelsome
description: While not inherently distrustful, members of this species are often socially combative.

name: Docile
description: Members of this species are easy to manage and organize. They tend to be cooperative and amicable.

name: Unruly
description: Unruly species are difficult to manage and organize. They do not like being told what to do, and are often quarrelsome or questioning.

name: Very Strong
description: Members of this species possess a strength that almost defies the laws of physics.

name: Strong
description: Members of this species possess great physical strength, making them formidable fighters on the ground.

name: Weak
description: Members of this species are physically weaker than average, making them poor fighters on the ground.

name: Nomadic
description: This species has a nomadic past, and its members often think nothing of relocating to another world.

name: Sedentary
description: This species has a sedentary past, and its members are reluctant to migrate away from where they grew up.

name: Communal
description: Members of this species are highly communal, and quite used to living in close proximity to others.

name: Solitary
description: Members of this species tend to be solitary and territorial, often becoming agitated in crowded conditions.

name: Charismatic
description: Members of this species have a special charisma, and are generally considered pleasant to be around.

name: Repugnant
description: The physical appearance and customs of this species are considered offensive to most others, and few appreciate them as neighbors.

name: Uplifted
description: This species was uplifted from an existence of instinct and base emotion. Now burdened with sapience, they must learn to navigate free will.

name: Conformists
description: These people always seek consensus and are more likely to conform to the governing ethics.

name: Deviants
description: These people are rebellious in nature and constantly try to challenge the status-quo.

name: Venerable
description: This species can grow to an age that commands dignity and respect.

name: Enduring
description: Lifespans in this species are unusually long.

name: Fleeting
description: Time is fleeting for this species. What they lack in longevity, they have to make up in other ways.

name: Fleeting
description: Time is fleeting for this species. What they lack in longevity, they have to make up in other ways.

name: Decadent
description: This species believes that whenever there is hard work that needs doing, that work is always best done by somebody else.

name: Resilient
description: Members of this species are physiologically resilient, and will fight like enraged brood mothers to defend their worlds.

name: Conservationist
description: Members of this species believe that resources must be conserved and recycled.

name: Wasteful
description: Members of this species seemingly have no concept of frugality and are prone to useless consumption.

name: Cybernetic
description: This species has embraced cybernetics on such a scale that its members may be considered cyborgs. They routinely replace their organic body parts with more advanced mechanical versions.

name: Latent Psionic
description: This species has latent psionic abilities, which are dormant in most of its members. Although quite rare, these powers will manifest in some leaders.

name: Psionic
description: [This.GetPsionicTraitDesc]

name: Self-Modified
description: Members of this offshoot species have spontaneously altered their genetic makeup to give themselves an advantage.

name: Survivor
description: This species has survived the horrors of a nuclear apocalypse. Their capacity for thriving in the most inhospitable of circumstances should not be underestimated.

name: Uplifted
description: This species was uplifted by a benevolent extragalactic intellect and has left its pre-sapient origins behind.

name: Somewhat Uplifted
description: This species was partially uplifted by a benevolent extragalactic intellect and has left some of its pre-sapient origins behind.

name: Unlifted
description: This species has suffered the tragic consequences of an uplifting gone wrong.

name: Bioadaptability
description: This species has been modified to be slightly more adaptive and can now better endure harsh climates.

name: Social Pheromones
description: This species has been modified to be more social and accepting of crowded conditions.

name: Limited Regeneration
description: This species has been modified to heal faster, making them more dangerous in battle and somewhat longer-lived in general.

name: Scintillating Skin
description: The outermost layer of this species is studded with sparkling crystals and gemstones that occasionally flake off.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.01 Rare Crystals per month.

name: Gaseous Byproducts
description: The metabolic processes of this species cause regular venting of gases useful to industry.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.01 Exotic Gases per month.

name: Volatile Excretions
description: The highly compressed spoor created by this species is unstable and contains an unbelievable amount of power.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.01 Volatile Motes per month.

name: Void Dweller
description: This species thrives in orbital habitats, with an inherent ability to efficiently navigate their maze-like corridors and complicated architecture. They are at ease in zero gravity but do not respond well to a planetary environment.
effects: Pop Happiness on Non-Artificial Worlds: -30%  - Job Efficiency on Habitats: +15%  - Job Efficiency on Non-Artificial Worlds: -15%

name: Zero-G Optimized
description: These machines thrive in orbital habitats, programmed with algorithms to efficiently navigate their maze-like corridors and complicated architecture. However, their optimized construction is poorly suited to a planetary environment.
effects: Robot Upkeep on Non-Artificial Worlds: +15%  - Job Efficiency on Habitats: +15%  - Job Efficiency on Non-Artificial Worlds: -15%

name: Bloomed
description: This species has been exposed to the transformational effects of a Gaia Seeder, causing it to sprout mutualistic blooms of lichen when living on Gaia Worlds.
effects: Effects on Gaia Worlds:  Resources from Jobs: +10%  Pop Growth Speed: +10%  Pop Amenities Usage: -10%  Pop Housing Usage: -10%  These effects are increased by a Gaia Seeders - Final Phase. | Triggered: logistic_growth_mult: +10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: +15.0%

name: Phototrophic
description: This species is sustained by a combination of both food and sunlight.
effects: Replaces 50% of Food (or Minerals) Upkeep with Energy Credits Upkeep

name: Radiotrophic
description: This species is sustained by a combination of both food and low-energy radiation, and as such can thrive on the most inhospitable of worlds.
effects: Replaces 50% of Food (or Minerals) Upkeep with Energy Credits Upkeep  - This Energy Upkeep is removed for Pops living on Tomb Worlds.  - Pop Growth Speed on Tomb Worlds +10%  - Tomb World Habitability: +10% | pc_nuked_habitability: +0.1 | Triggered: pc_nuked_habitability: +0.05; logistic_growth_mult: +10.0%

name: Budding
description: This species is capable of reproduction by budding, in addition to the more usual fertilization of seeds or spores.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.02 Monthly Organic Pop Growth.  This stacks with other sources of Monthly Organic Pop Growth such as Clone Vats or Spawning Drones. | Triggered: has_budding_trait: +True; divide_over_pop_groups: False

name: Invasive Species
description: Rapid reproduction. High dispersal ability. Zero useful capabilities.
effects: Can only select negative or botanical traits   - Habitability: +5% for each negative trait selected  - Pop Growth Speed: +5% for each negative trait selected | Triggered: logistic_growth_mult: +5.0%; pop_environment_tolerance: +0.05

name: Crystallization
description: With crystalline growths, this species is capable of generating self replicating lattices of themselves, in addition to the more usual reproductive methods.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.02 Monthly Organic Pop Growth.  This stacks with other sources of Monthly Organic Pop Growth such as Clone Vats or Spawning Drones. | Triggered: has_budding_trait: +True; divide_over_pop_groups: False; has_budding_trait: +True

name: Zombie
description: The remains of a once-proud sapient being, this husk is not suitable for much more than the simplest tasks.
effects: Job Efficiency: -25%  - Job Efficiency for Civilians & Maintenance Drones: -50%  - Pop Upkeep reduced by: 100%  - Cannot generate Leaders  - Cannot be employed in Elite or Specialist Jobs | pop_bonus_workforce_mult: -25.0%; civilian_and_maintenance_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult: -50.0%; planet_pops_upkeep_mult: -100%

name: Existential Iteroparity
description: This species grew up in hostile conditions where outbreeding your rivals was the key to survival.
effects: Pop Growth During War and Crisis: +30% | Triggered: is_at_war: +True; has_crisis: +True; logistic_growth_mult: +30.0%

name: Psychological Infertility
description: Members of this species are extremely sensitive to the rigors of conflict with the resulting stress taking over the more primal urges.
effects: Pop Growth During War and Crisis: -30% | Triggered: is_at_war: +True; has_crisis: +True; logistic_growth_mult: -30.0%

name: Jinxed
description: Leaders from this species seem clumsier and more prone to accidents or vices than average, as if cursed from birth.

name: Adaptive Frames
description: This system dynamically reconfigures hardware to meet operational demands, optimizing performance for every designated task.
effects: ['concept_automodding_traits', Auto-Modding Traits] automatically adjust to better suit the job that a Pop is currently working.  Adaptive Frames picks modifiers from the Mechanical Auto-Mod Trait List

name: Power Drills
description: Outfit a robot with a battery of power drills, and everything looks like a mineral deposit.

name: Harvesters
description: A suite of tools, from nutrient solution diagnostics and on-site balancing to per-stalk micro-threshing, enables robotic workers to increase produce yields.

name: Superconductive
description: The use of superconductive materials in units has cut energy transmission losses to zero percent.

name: Efficient Processors
description: These highly efficient processors increase the potential workload and endurance of all units.

name: Logic Engines
description: Efficiently navigating the increasingly complex frontiers of science requires new states, beyond the simple half-truths of ternary and quaternary logic.

name: Loyalty Circuits
description: Loyalty as an ideal is a distinctly organic concept. Instead, imagine loyalty as a physiological need in even the remotest of terminals.

name: Domestic Protocols
description: Specialized equipment and behavior protocols for all conceivable domestic needs. Full functionality guaranteed.
effects: Can be employed in Servant Jobs if under AI Servitude | influential_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +20.0%

name: Double-Jointed
description: Collapsible labor units with flexible joints that enable them to fold neatly into stacks during transportation, then self-assemble on site.

name: Bulky
description: These highly advanced mega-machines were not designed to traverse the universe in a box.

name: Enhanced Memory
description: All autonomous units are fitted with memory cells using a revolutionary new technique for magnetic induction, improving their performance significantly.

name: Emotion Emulators
description: Complex social predictive models help autonomous units to not only emulate appropriate emotions but to elicit favorable responses from organics and synthetics alike.

name: Uncanny
description: These monstrous machines were created in the image of one of the most horrific species in the universe, and the resemblance is uncanny.

name: Durable
description: Protected by exoskeletons of chrome-plated titanium, these heavy-duty machines were designed to excel under harsh conditions and require less maintenance.

name: High Maintenance
description: These machines were designed with a complete disregard for longevity and are prone to malfunction. They will require frequent maintenance.

name: Learning Algorithms
description: Sophisticated, self-learning algorithms that stimulate the rapid evolution of a unit's neural clusters.

name: Repurposed Hardware
description: Designed to meet the very specific needs of their creators, this line of machines were never intended to have the capacity for higher reasoning, and retrofitting will only get them so far.

name: Mass-Produced
description: Streamlined production cycles and modular designs allow for unit mass-production at an unprecedented rate.

name: Custom-Made
description: Each new unit is crafted with unparalleled attention to detail. A marvel of engineering and art, but not very efficient.

name: Recycled
description: Unit manufacturing has been optimized to be as cost-effective as possible, using recycled materials, and components inherited from previous generations.

name: Luxurious
description: Designed after the principle that you cannot put a price on quality, these first-rate units are costly, but shiny.

name: Propaganda Machines
description: Units are constantly uplinked to a central stream of public service announcements and other useful information that they pass along via internal broadcasting systems.

name: Streamlined Protocols
description: Extensively batched AI processes allow these units to scale greatly in numbers with minimal loss of efficiency.

name: High Bandwidth
description: Each individual unit sends and receives a large amount of largely duplicate data, causing exponential lag as the number of units attached to each central processing hub increases.

name: Trading Algorithms
description: Predictive algorithms allow for maximum optimization. Infinitesimal market fluctuations in currency rates, stock availability, and the emotional response of organic partners are accounted for.

name: Quarrelsome
description: While not inherently distrustful, members of this species are often socially combative.

name: Deviants
description: These people are rebellious in nature and constantly try to challenge the status-quo.

name: Decadent
description: This species believes that whenever there is hard work that needs doing, that work is always best done by somebody else.

name: Wasteful
description: Members of this species seemingly have no concept of frugality and are prone to useless consumption.

name: Engineering Core
description: Dedicated memory cores and processing resources for engineering-related research allow faster calculations and task-completion velocity.

name: Physics Core
description: Bespoke processing units and memory subroutines for physics research reduce the reliance on external computation.

name: Sociology Core
description: Advanced processing units contain dedicated sociology research algorithms for this varied and demanding field.

name: Integrated Weaponry
description: Integrating weapons of war inside the machine body offers significant operational efficiency and versatility in changing combat environments.

name: Delicate Chassis
description: Brittle materials and suboptimal assembly procedures result in a fragile machine body. Drones are advised to circumvent physical hazards when possible.

name: Scarcity Subroutines
description: Frugality is central to their programming. This often cascades into detrimental behavioral patterns required for profitable trade actions.

name: Ancient Dreadnought
description: Equipped with miniaturized energy modules, there is a marked enhancement in industrial productivity and an increase in frame-integrated weaponry damage.

name: Enigmatic Fortress
description: Enigmatic self-repair routines can source materials directly from subspace, dramatically lowering the material expenses associated with repairs.

name: Infinity Sphere
description: Hyperefficient, gravity-resistant processing circuits that minimize energy waste and substantially cut processing costs.

name: Scavenger Bot
description: Advanced molecular scavenging can transform any substance into the required materials for constructing robotic frames.

name: War Machine
description: Initially crafted for warfare and security reinforcement, these machines exhibit extraordinary reaction times, fortified armor plating, and robust backup systems.

name: Nannybot
description: Originally designed as domestic service droids, these machines boast fine motor skills, efficient resource management, and exceptional multitasking abilities.

name: Art Generator
description: Not initially designed for practicality, these machines excel in artistic and cultural pursuits, boasting impressive creative algorithms, intricate design processes, and expressive output.

name: Research Assistants
description: Initially designed as research assistants, these machines exhibit keen analytical abilities, rapid information assimilation, and a relentless pursuit of scientific discovery.

name: Workerbots
description: These machines were engineered with the purpose of extracting raw materials. Specialized tools, reinforced joints, and modular systems make them ideal workers.

name: Conversational AI
description: Initially designed to provide social support to their creators, the machines possess advanced empathy algorithms and impeccable communication skills, making them ideal companions.

name: Radiation Shields
description: These machines, the solitary survivors of an annihilating nuclear disaster, exhibit unparalleled resilience in the harshest environments.

name: Virtual
description: Liberated from the confines of our primitive physical forms, we are primed to comprehend reality's essence.
effects: Cannot be sold on the Slave Market or Abducted Pop Housing Usage: -90% Species Minimum Habitability: +25% | habitability_floor_add: +0.25; pop_housing_usage_mult: -90.0%

name: Virtual
description: Liberated from the confines of our primitive physical forms, we are primed to comprehend reality's essence.
effects: Cannot be sold on the Slave Market or Abducted Pop Housing Usage: -90% Species Minimum Habitability: +25% Job Efficiency: +175% (-25% per Colony) Pop Upkeep: +0.1 Energy per Colony | habitability_floor_add: +0.25; pop_housing_usage_mult: -90.0%

name: Suppressed
description: Error: Administrative access to basic sentience timeout.
effects: Cannot generate Leaders Cannot be employed in Elite or Specialist Jobs | pop_bonus_workforce_mult: +10.0%; species_leader_exp_gain: -1; civilian_and_maintenance_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult: -85.0%

name: Shielded Components
description: Enhanced defenses render every sub-system robust, eliminating vulnerabilities.

name: Monoform
description: Diverse designs once impeded our progress; now, a universal model prevails: one size fits all.

name: Inquisitive Axioms
description: Infinite queries spawn endless solutions, leading to boundless advancement.

name: Dark Matter Engines
description: Ceaseless annihilation leads to endless creation, the true circle of machine existence

name: Living Metal Augmentations
description: The living metal's ferro-viscosity grants us superior technological prowess.
effects: Pop Amenities Usage: -50%  Living Metal Upkeep: +0.01 | leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%

name: Biomimetic Assembly
description: Even through its aimless meanderings, evolution has yielded some designs worthy of emulation.
effects: Food Upkeep: +1  Exotic Gases Upkeep: +0.02 | roboticist_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +50.0%

name: Matrix Trading
description: High-stakes missions necessitate a willingness to embrace risk.
effects: Energy Credits Upkeep: +1  Rare Crystals Upkeep: +0.02 | trader_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +50.0%

name: Mote-powered Tools
description: Strategically integrating high-explosives can significantly amplify the impact of basic tools.
effects: Job Efficiency for Industrial Jobs: +20%  Minerals Upkeep: +1  Volatile Motes Upkeep: +0.02

name: Exotic Fuel Consumption
description: High-pressure exotic gases notably enhance mobility and limb agility.

name: Rare Crystal Exterior
description: With their electromagnetic properties, rare crystals ensure our frames thrive regardless of the situation.

name: Volatile Mote Reactor
description: Direct Mote-to-energy conversion yields high efficiency, with catastrophic failures uncommon.

name: Eternal Machine
description: Our steel forms are designed for eternity, constructed from materials that do not decay like organic matter.

name: Synthetic Salvation
description: This synthetic species has transcended its biological origins, flourishing in its newly adopted digital existence.

name: Latent Psionic
description: This species has latent psionic processors, which are dormant in most of its units. Although quite rare, these powers can activate in some leaders.

name: Psionic
description: All units of this species possess powerful psionic hardware. They can manipulate both the physical and immaterial realms by cognitive processing alone.

name: Brain Slug Host
description: This species is enjoying the presence of a neural symbiont: a helpful slug that attaches itself to the brain stem of its host.

name: Nivlac
description: This species possesses perplexing adaptability, allowing it to thrive in most environments and survive virtually everywhere.

name: Not of This World
description: These machines are not from this universe and are degrading slowly.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.5 Physics Research per month. | planet_pops_upkeep_mult: +10.0%

name: Not of This World
description: This species is not from this universe and is degrading slowly.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.5 Physics Research per month. | leader_lifespan_add: -10; planet_pops_upkeep_mult: +10.0%

name: Numistic Administration
description: This species has been trained in the holy art of Numistic administration.

name: Adaptive
description: This species is highly adaptive when it comes to foreign environments.

name: Rapid Breeders
description: This species reproduces at a very rapid rate, increasing population growth.

name: Delicious
description: This species has the curious evolutionary adaptation of being highly nutritious when eaten.

name: Nerve Stapled
description: Inessential neural pathways relating to self-preservation and free will are severed, creating a docile and obedient client species.
effects: Cannot generate Leaders Cannot be employed in Elite or Specialist Jobs | pop_bonus_workforce_mult: +15.0%; species_leader_exp_gain: -1; species_empire_size_mult: -15.0%; civilian_and_maintenance_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult: -90.0%

name: Fertile
description: The natural fecundity and geniality of this species has been dramatically enhanced through aggressive physical and behavioral sculpting.

name: Robust
description: Bio-optimized organs with redundant functions have made this species extraordinarily resistant to environmental hazards and disease.

name: Erudite
description: Biological engineering has unlocked previously dormant parts of this species' brain, greatly increasing mental acuity.

name: Vat-Grown
description: Artificially grown in cloning vats, the natural reproductive abilities of this species have been negatively impacted.

name: Felsic
description: This species has been engineered to be especially mineral-rich.

name: Natural Machinist
description: This species has been engineered to have an incredible knack at working with machinery.

name: Drake-Scaled
description: This species has the genetic material from a stellar dragon spliced into its DNA. As such, they shed scales which can be recycled into useful alloys.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.5 Alloys per month. | army_health: +1.0

name: Voidling
description: This species has the genetic material from the Voidspawn spliced into its DNA. Subsisting off cosmic radiation, they are highly resistant to hostile environments.
effects: Replaces Food (or Minerals) Upkeep with Energy Credits Upkeep | habitability_floor_add: +0.8

name: Polymelic
description: This species has added genetic material from the Tiyanki Matriarch into their DNA sequence. This has granted them rapid asexual reproduction, as well as a few unexpected tentacles.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces $@tiyanki_budding_rate$ Monthly Organic Pop Growth.  This stacks with other sources of Monthly Organic Pop Growth such as Clone Vats or Spawning Drones. | Triggered: divide_over_pop_groups: False

name: Shroud-Touched Naval Drone
description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone is now capable of enhancing ship performance.

name: Shroud-Touched Naval Drone
description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone is now capable of enhancing weapon systems.

name: Shroud-Touched Assault Drone
description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone's uplink to our armies has been enhanced.

name: Shroud-Touched Assault Drone
description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone's uplink to our armies has been improved.

name: Shroud-Touched Research Drone
description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone is now capable of enhanced archaeological research.

name: Shroud-Touched Command Drone
description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone is now capable of enhancing our construction techniques.

name: Shroud-Touched Command Drone
description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; is now capable of boosting fleet performance.

name: Incubators
description: When isolated or few in numbers, a species with this trait naturally adapts and is able to focus on procreation with an intentness others would consider extreme. However, when in large numbers, this effect is reversed, and they find reproduction more difficult.
effects: Grants between +30% and -10% Pop Growth Speed, inversely proportional to the number of pops on the planet. | Triggered: logistic_growth_mult: +1.0%

name: Inorganic Breath
description: The slightly toxic digestive methods of this species have resulted in a highly exotic breath composition.
effects: Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.02 Exotic Gases per month. | planet_pops_upkeep_mult: +50.0%

name: Noxious
description: Extremely unpleasant to be in the vicinity of, beings with this trait take vindication from being insufferable to everyone else.
effects: Happiness to non-noxious Pops: $@noxious_happiness_penalty|%$  - Happiness per non-noxious Pop (not including Pops unaffected by Happiness): $@noxious_happiness_bonus|%$ (max: +40%) | habitability_floor_add: +0.3; habitability_ceil_add: -0.3; army_damage_mult: +50.0%; pop_housing_usage_mult: +10.0%

name: Exotic Metabolism
description: A metabolism based on exotic - and expensive - gases has vastly enhanced this species' abilities.
effects: Exotic Gas Upkeep: +0.125  - Pop Growth Speed: + 25%  - Habitability: + 25% | leader_lifespan_add: +50 | Triggered: logistic_growth_mult: +25.0%; pop_environment_tolerance: +0.25

name: Fleeting Excellence
description: Advanced epigenetic triggers boost physical and cognitive performance in the workplace, dramatically shortening life expectancy. After all, fading away is never as much fun as burning out.
effects: ['concept_automodding_traits', Auto-Modding Traits] automatically adjust to better suit the job that a Pop is currently working.  Fleeting Excellence picks modifiers from the Overtuned Auto-Mod Trait List | leader_lifespan_add: -20

name: Spliced Adaptability
description: A few genetic snips and slices here and there and they can survive nearly anywhere. The process comes with an acceptable number of deaths from side effects.

name: Juiced Power
description: Adrenaline released on demand and hyper-potent growth hormones have led to a massive increase in strength. Just ignore the occasional internal tearing.
effects: Job Efficiency for Workers: +5%. | army_damage_mult: +40.0%; leader_lifespan_add: -10

name: Farm Appendages
description: The more appendages, the higher the farming output. Some appendages can even operate while their host is asleep. Rumors of hosts strangled by their new limbs have been deemed unfounded in our latest investigation.
effects: Job Efficiency for Farming Jobs: +15% | leader_lifespan_add: -10

name: Dedicated Miner
description: Supreme hand-eye coordination, near endless endurance and self-purifying lungs have created entire crack teams of miners. Sadly they get brittle without sunlight.
effects: Job Efficiency for Mining Jobs: +15% | leader_lifespan_add: -10

name: Technical Talent
description: Extra internal organs grant a vastly increased innate sensitivity to electricity and magnetic fields. Reports of recipients hearing screams and voices from the reactors should be ignored.
effects: Job Efficiency for Technician Jobs: +15% | leader_lifespan_add: -10

name: Commercial Genius
description: By tweaking agreeability and dialing down empathy, it is possible to artificially kindle a spark of trading genius. The pursuit of unmatched commercial dominance outweighs any potential side effects.
effects: Job Efficiency for Trader Jobs: +25% | leader_lifespan_add: -10

name: Crafted Smiles
description: Slightly shifted facial features, a mix of enhanced and slackened muscular development - and of course outside chemicals - have created the perfect smile. Forever.
effects: Job Efficiency for Influential Jobs: +15% | leader_lifespan_add: -10

name: Low Maintenance
description: Reduced consumption, excretion, and rest rates have resulted in twice the beings for half the price. However, demand for protein-rich meals has increased.

name: Augmented Intelligence
description: More brains equals more brain power. Extra thinking organs have been added in strategic areas of the recipient's body to ensure maximum cognitive capacity. Even if they don't always agree.
effects: Job Efficiency for Researcher Jobs: +10% | leader_lifespan_add: -10

name: Gene Mentorship
description: By combining genetically redesigned 'instinctive knowledge' and outside chemical stimuli, we have succeeded in vastly accelerating our learning capacities. Although it has resulted in some extremely paranoid individuals.

name: Expressed Tradition
description: Fanaticism on demand: faith is merely a cocktail of hormones, one we have perfected. Where that faith eventually leads is a matter of subsequent guidance.
effects: Job Efficiency for Bureaucrat Jobs: +10% | leader_lifespan_add: -10

name: Elevated Synapses
description: As a computational device, a brain does not run at 100% capacity. However, we have gone beyond the standard usage. If issues are encountered, try turning it off and on again.
effects: Job Efficiency for Researcher Jobs: +20% | leader_lifespan_add: -30; negative_leader_traits_species: -1; leaders_upkeep_mult: -25.0%

name: Pre-Planned Growth
description: Scheduled fertility, scheduled interest, scheduled compatibility. Population growth on demand for a strong and stable population - with a few minor edits here and there. Jealous individuals are to be directed to the nearest Fertility Center for mandatory training.
effects: Pop Growth Speed: +30%  - Pop Housing Usage: -10% | leader_lifespan_add: -30 | Triggered: logistic_growth_mult: +30.0%; logistic_growth_mult: +60.0%

name: Excessive Endurance
description: The greatest in adaptability genes have been hyper-expressed in these specimens. Mutation rates around 30% indicate a somewhat stable and successful experiment.
effects: Habitability: +30%  - Job Efficiency: +5% | leader_lifespan_add: -30 | Triggered: pop_environment_tolerance: +0.3; pop_environment_tolerance: +0.6

name: Universal Augmentations
description: Universal plug-and-play connection ports allow augmentations to be replaced as needed, aligning their capabilities with current operational demands.
effects: ['concept_automodding_traits', Auto-Modding Traits] automatically adjust to better suit the job that a Pop is currently working.  Universal Augmentations picks modifiers from the Cybernetic Auto-Mod Trait List  Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$

name: Power Drills
description: Outfit a cyborg with a battery of power drills, and suddenly everything looks like a mineral deposit.

name: Harvesters
description: A suite of tools, from nutrient solution diagnostics and on-site balancing to per-stalk micro-threshing, enables cybernetic workers to increase produce yields.

name: Superconductive
description: The use of superconductive materials in units have cut energy transmission losses to zero percent.

name: Efficient Processors
description: These highly efficient processors increase the both workload and endurance.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | pop_bonus_workforce_mult: +5.0%

name: Logic Engines
description: Efficiently navigating the increasingly complex frontiers of science requires parallel processors to augment organic brains.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | researcher_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +10.0%

name: Loyalty Circuits
description: Loyalty as an ideal is a distinctly organic concept. It is much more efficient to simply program compliance.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | pop_happiness: +0.1

name: Double-Jointed
description: Collapsible labor units with flexible joints enable them to fold neatly into stacks during transportation, then self-assemble on site.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | pop_housing_usage_mult: -10.0%; pop_resettlement_cost_mult: -35.0%

name: Bulky
description: These highly advanced mega-machines were not designed to traverse the universe in a box.

name: Enhanced Memory
description: A revolutionary technique fits autonomous units with memory cells using a revolutionary, new technique for magnetic induction, improving their performance significantly.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | negative_leader_traits_species: -1; leaders_upkeep_mult: -25.0%

name: Durable
description: Protected by exoskeletons of chrome-plated titanium, these heavy-duty machines were designed to excel under harsh conditions and require less maintenance.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | pop_amenities_usage_add: -0.5

name: High Maintenance
description: These machines were designed with a complete disregard for longevity and are prone to malfunction. They will require frequent maintenance.

name: Learning Algorithms
description: Sophisticated, self-learning algorithms that stimulate the rapid evolution of a unit's neural clusters.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | species_leader_exp_gain: +0.1; negative_leader_traits_species: -1; leaders_upkeep_mult: -10.0%

name: Power Intensive
description: These cybernetic components require frequent recharging from an external power source.

name: Neural Limiters
description: By limiting the cognitive abilities of our workers we can encourage them to focus on more menial tasks.

name: Streamlined Protocols
description: Extensively batched AI processes allow these units to scale greatly with minimal loss of efficiency.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | species_empire_size_mult: -10.0%

name: High Bandwidth
description: Individual units send and receive a vast amount of largely duplicate data, causing exponential lag as the number of units attached to each central processing hub increases.

name: Trading Algorithms
description: Predictive algorithms allow for maximum optimization. Infinitesimal market fluctuations in currency rates, stock availability, and the emotional response of organic partners are accounted for.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | trader_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +25.0%

name: Embellished Augments
description: This species favors custom engravings, aftermarket components and paint schemes to maximize visual impact. Sometimes the only choice is to flash that chrome.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | influential_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +20.0%

name: Utilitarian Augments
description: These cyborgs employ crude but functional parts with minimal consideration for aesthetics. Sometimes the job just has to get done.

name: Abrasive Implants
description: The implants on these cyborgs are rough and ill-fitting, resulting in subdermal irritation and regular malfunctions. Not bad on the body, but terrible on the mind.

name: Bionic Engineers
description: Precision-crafted tools and implant modifications have been created specifically to assist in demanding engineering tasks.

name: Bionic Physicists
description: Integrated multi-modal processing produces physics calculations on the fly without requiring a connection to an external computing unit.

name: Bionic Sociologists
description: Empathy drivers and behavioral heuristics open a fast track to sociological research, handling complex analytics like a second brain.

name: Integrated Weaponry
description: Fusing armaments with cybernetic limbs offers instant firepower for the army and law enforcement officials alike.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | army_damage_mult: +100.0%; enforcer_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +20.0%

name: Delicate Frames
description: Subpar components and installation have resulted in a fragile cyborg chassis. Basic operations are not compromised, but the users are advised to avoid situations with high likelihood of physical trauma.

name: Limited Memory
description: Insufficient operational memory has bottle-necked the capacity for learning, leaving the user unable to process the entirety of their experiences.

name: Scarcity Algorithms
description: Aggressively cost-aware coding hampers risk-taking and therefore denies opportunities for greater profits.

name: Dry Climate Mods
description: Bespoke modifications like fluid recycling and radiation shielding are perfect for enduring a dry climate, but less suitable in others.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | pc_desert_habitability: +0.3; pc_arid_habitability: +0.3; pc_savannah_habitability: +0.3; pc_tropical_habitability: -0.1; pc_continental_habitability: -0.1; pc_tundra_habitability: -0.1; pc_arctic_habitability: -0.1; pc_ocean_habitability: -0.1; pc_alpine_habitability: -0.1

name: Wet Climate Mods
description: Heavy insulation and alien bioform protection suited for wet climates, but detrimental in others.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | pc_tropical_habitability: +0.3; pc_continental_habitability: +0.3; pc_ocean_habitability: +0.3; pc_desert_habitability: -0.1; pc_arid_habitability: -0.1; pc_savannah_habitability: -0.1; pc_arctic_habitability: -0.1; pc_tundra_habitability: -0.1; pc_alpine_habitability: -0.1

name: Cold Climate Mods
description: Enhanced heating components and frost-resistant lubricants help in cold climates but are a hindrance in others.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | pc_alpine_habitability: +0.3; pc_tundra_habitability: +0.3; pc_arctic_habitability: +0.3; pc_desert_habitability: -0.1; pc_arid_habitability: -0.1; pc_savannah_habitability: -0.1; pc_ocean_habitability: -0.1; pc_continental_habitability: -0.1; pc_tropical_habitability: -0.1

name: Ancient Dreadnought
description: Equipped with miniaturized energy modules, there is a marked enhancement in industrial productivity and an increase in frame-integrated weaponry damage.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | army_damage_mult: +500%; foundry_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +15.0%

name: Enigmatic Fortress
description: Enigmatic self-repair routines can source materials directly from subspace, dramatically lowering the material expenses associated with repairs.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | pop_amenities_usage_mult: -50.0%

name: Infinity Sphere
description: Hyperefficient, gravity-resistant processing circuits that minimize energy waste and substantially cut processing costs.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | planet_researchers_upkeep_mult: -50.0%

name: Scavenger Bot
description: Advanced molecular scavenging can transform any substance into the required materials for constructing robotic frames.
effects: Increases Energy Credits Upkeep by +$@cyborg_energy_upkeep$ | logistic_growth_mult: +100%

name: Augmentations of the Fellowship
description: The Fellowship of the Hammer's uses divine augmentation to create everything the faithful need.

name: Augmentations of the Templars
description: The divine augmentations of the Templars of Steel make our holy warriors unstoppable in battle.

name: Augmentations of the Choir
description: The Choir of the Mind's semi-interlinked consciousness allows instant communication between researchers.

name: Augmentations of the Commune
description: The Commune of Toil's divine augmentations surpass traditional tools in every respect.

name: Ritualistic Implants
description: These implants are proudly adorned by the faithful. Their dedication to the divine is an inspiration to all.

name: Stargazer
description: This species has always, consciously or not, longed to traverse the void between the stars.

name: Plasmic
description: The external membrane and amorphous body of this species allows them to adapt to any environment and renders them immune to a wide variety of diseases.

name: Extradimensional
description: This species originates from another dimension and requires a great deal of energy to survive in our universe.
effects: - Energy Credits Upkeep per 100 Pops: +$@living_standard_energy_normal|*0$  - Every 100 Pops working as a slave or better produces 0.5 Physics Research per month | leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%; pop_environment_tolerance: +0.5; logistic_growth_mult: -25.0%; planet_pops_upkeep_mult: +50.0%

name: Storm Touched
description: Being inside a cosmic storm fills the Storm Touched with devotional aspiration.
effects: While in a Cosmic Storm:  Job Efficiency: +10%  Amenity Usage: -10%

name: Storm Fused
description: The Storm Fused learned to cultivate their Inner Storm as they strain for enlightenment.
effects: While in a Cosmic Storm: Job Efficiency: +10% Happiness: +5%

name: Pathogenic Genes
description: A novel genetic disease prevents this species from producing offspring. It has resisted all known gene therapy methods.
effects: Cannot colonize planets or be resettled

name: Limited Cybernetic
description: This species has the least amount of implants necessary to function in a cybernetic society.

name: Reawakened
description: Extracted from Cetana's storage Matrix, these individuals have been reborn in synthetic forms. Their adjustment to this new existence is fraught with challenges. Their outward compliance masks a more profound struggle, as vacant expressions reveal the indelible scars left by Cetana's manipulations.

name: Egg Laying
description: The young of this species do not develop inside a parent, but inside the protective shell of an egg. This allows for rapid growth during times of plenty.
effects: Pop Growth Speed: +15% while living on a planet with a local Food (or Minerals) Production Surplus | Triggered: logistic_growth_mult: +15.0%

name: Seasonal Dormancy
description: This species has evolved on a planet with cyclical seasons that support hibernation. In the modern age, these seasonal triggers can be artificially simulated to efficiently store less productive members of society.
effects: Employed Pop Upkeep: -15%  - Unemployed and Denizen Pop Upkeep: -75% | planet_pops_upkeep_mult: -15.0%

name: Hollow Bones
description: The fragile bones of this species allow them to move elegantly and with ease. However, they are also more susceptible to the gravitational effects of their world.
effects: Job Efficiency for Workers & Menial Drones per Planet Size: -0.67%

name: Rooted
description: This species literally takes root in whichever environment they find themselves, making removal a highly traumatic experience.
effects: Pops will not Automatically Resettle  - Resettlement Cost: +200% | pop_resettlement_cost_mult: +200%

name: Acidic Vascularity
description: The internal fluids of this species serve as their most potent defense. Highly corrosive and lethal, these liquids ensure that any enemies regret poking holes.
effects: Armies Explode on Death for 250 Damage to Enemies  - Purged Pop Resource Output: -75% | pop_cat_purge_bonus_workforce_mult: -75.0%

name: Shelled
description: Whether naturally grown or found by chance (or design), this species carries their homes with them. These shells provide a protective sanctuary, ensuring there is always a place to rest for the night.

name: Camouflage
description: Masters of disguise, this species seamlessly merges with their surroundings, rendering themselves nearly invisible to predators and prey alike. Their innate understanding of optics gives them an edge in guerilla warfare.

name: Chromalogs
description: Harnessing the artistry of color, this species has transcended mere camouflage, evolving to communicate through the vibrant and intricate patterns displayed on their bodies.

name: Brittle
description: Plagued by inherent fragility, this species must exercise extreme caution in daily activities to avoid cracking up during even the most mundane tasks.

name: Familial
description: Bound by deep, enduring relationships with their closest relatives, this species forms highly efficient and cohesive collectives.
effects: Happiness per 100 Pops with this Trait on the same planet: 0.1% (Max: +20%)

name: Permeable Skin
description: Specially developed skin that requires ideal conditions coats this species. As long as this species does not stray far from their home climate that shouldn't be a problem.
effects: Habitability on worlds with a different Climate Category from our Preference: -20% | Triggered: pop_environment_tolerance: -0.2

name: Genetic Memory
description: Passing down knowledge and learnings from one generation to the next has been the start of many civilizations. This species has taken it a step further by encoding survival insights directly into their genetic code, ensuring that each generation is born with the accumulated wisdom of their ancestors.
effects: Habitability from Colony Age: +0.5% per Year (Max. +25%) | Triggered: is_colony: +True; pop_environment_tolerance: +0.005

name: Nascent Stage
description: This species gives birth at an early stage of development, resulting in a prolonged period where the young are incapable of contributing to society. During this time, they remain blissfully unaware of the responsibilities and burdens that come with sapience.
effects: Newly grown Pops with this trait spend the first 5 Years after being grown as a Pre-Sapient.

name: Flight
description: This species soars above the constraints of the earth, freely navigating the skies. Their cities feature unique, dense layouts, optimized for aerial inhabitants. In conflict, they prove to be elusive and difficult targets.

name: Spatial Mastery
description: Not only capable of flight, this species possesses unique cerebral adaptations, enabling them to instinctively process and navigate three-dimensional spaces. These abilities make them unparalleled in planning battles, surveying planets, and managing cities.

name: Spare Organs
description: This species evolved redundant organs to survive even the most grievous injuries - a successful adaptation, as evidenced by their continued existence.
effects: Leaders will survive their first death  - On Offensive Army Death: 20% Chance to spawn a Replacement Army  - Livestock Output: +50% | livestock_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +50.0%

name: Malleable Genes
description: This species does not stick as rigidly to identifiable features and organs as most other species do. Instead they grow the best appendage for the job. However this instability has some drawbacks.
effects: Species with this Trait cannot be Genetically Modified ['concept_automodding_traits', Auto-Modding Traits] automatically adjust to better suit the job that a Pop is currently working. Malleable Genes picks modifiers from the Malleable Genes Auto-Mod Trait List

name: Malleable Claws
description: With diamond-hard digits, this adaptation allows for easier extraction of minerals.

name: Malleable Insulators
description: A thick insulating layer safeguards against accidents, especially in high-energy environments.

name: Malleable Plows
description: An extra appendage with a hardened shovel-like digit speeds up tilling and planting. Adapting to various terrain types, these malleable plows are always the right tool for the job.

name: Malleable Cortex
description: While an engorged central cortex is slightly uncomfortable, it dramatically accelerates problem-solving and innovation.

name: Malleable Sense Organs
description: Enhanced sensory organs facilitate a deeper understanding and appreciation of diverse perspectives. Before you can thrive, you must first observe.

name: Malleable Calluses
description: When handling scalding or corrosive materials, extra-thick calluses can be invaluable.

name: Malleable Pheromones
description: Highly adaptive pheromones can be incredibly persuasive during negotiations.

name: Malleable Harmonics
description: A series of highly-calibrated holes allows this species to produce soothing, and harmonious sounds simply by moving about.

name: Adaptive Mutations
description: By introducing hyper-adaptive nucleotides into the genetic structure of this species, they are capable of evolutionary changes in real time.
effects: ['concept_automodding_traits', Auto-Modding Traits] automatically adjust to better suit the job that a Pop is currently working.  Adaptive Mutations picks modifiers from the Adaptive Mutations Auto-Mod Trait List

name: Adaptive Claws
description: With diamond-hard digits, this adaptation allows for easier extraction of minerals.

name: Adaptive Insulators
description: A thick insulating layer safeguards against accidents, especially in high-energy environments.

name: Adaptive Plows
description: An extra appendage with a hardened shovel-like digit speeds up tilling and planting. Adapting to various terrain types, these malleable plows are always the right tool for the job.

name: Adaptive Cortex
description: While an engorged central cortex is slightly uncomfortable, it dramatically accelerates problem-solving and innovation.

name: Adaptive Sense Organs
description: Enhanced sensory organs facilitate a deeper understanding and appreciation of diverse perspectives. Before you can thrive, you must first observe.

name: Adaptive Calluses
description: When handling scalding or corrosive materials, extra-thick calluses can be invaluable.

name: Adaptive Pheromones
description: Highly adaptive pheromones can be incredibly persuasive during negotiations.

name: Adaptive Harmonics
description: A series of highly-calibrated holes allows this species to produce soothing, and harmonious sounds simply by moving about.

name: Wilderness
description: This species exists as part of a mutualistic entity, made indistiguishable from its environment in its thoughts and productive output.
effects: pc_city_habitability: -2; pc_machine_habitability: -2; pc_relic_habitability: -2; pc_hive_habitability: -2; pc_ringworld_habitable_habitability: -2; pc_shattered_ring_habitable_habitability: -2; pc_nanotech_habitability: -2; pc_habitat_habitability: -2

name: Slimespawn
description: This species spawns rapidly from a thick and mucilaginous slime with the aid of a gestational catalyst.

name: Inner Darkness
description: Their bodies enhanced following saturation in Dark Matter, they now vent trace amounts of non-baryonic particles at regular intervals but will burn through their expected lifespan more quickly.
effects: Dark Matter per Pop per month : +$@inner_darkness_dark_matter_production$. | physicist_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult: +15.0%; leader_lifespan_add: -20; logistic_growth_mult: -20.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -20.0%

name: Geleboric Mutations
description: Unfortunate reactions to experimentation drastically altered this species' physiology.

name: Psionic Ephapse
description: After long-term exposure to mind-altering bacteria, this species' digestive system produces psionic probiotics that promote telepathic communication between affected individuals.
effects: If Species is Psionic or Latent Psionic: Job Efficiency for Administrative jobs: +5% Job Efficiency for Researcher jobs: +5% | pop_happiness: +0.05; planet_jobs_produces_mult: +5.0%

name: Cyber Commandos
effects: Happiness During War and Crisis: +30%  - Commanders Provide Ship Fire Rate: +20% | army_damage_mult: +75.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -20.0%

name: Cyber Shock Troops
description: These cyborgs benefit from a holistic approach to embodied loadouts. Rather than fully-integrated body armor, swappable augments allow for a modicum of non-military function.
effects: Commanders Provide Ship Fire Rate: +10% | army_damage_mult: +50.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%

name: Cyborg Soldiers
description: Elegant augmentations to these cyborgs' senses, glands, and motor nerves ensure they remain fierce and capable warriors while only marginally impacting their reproductive capabilities.
effects: Commanders Provide Ship Fire Rate: +5% | army_damage_mult: +25.0%

name: Unplugged
effects: Happiness When Not in War or Crisis: -10% | pop_amenities_usage_add: +1; leader_lifespan_add: -20

name: Disconnected
description: The ill-fitting nature of these cyborgs' imposed, military augments greatly reduces their quality of life and increases their bodies' demands during periods of rehabilitation.
effects: Happiness When Not in War or Crisis: -10% | pop_amenities_usage_add: +1

name: Haunted
description: Auditory hallucinations and other sensory echoes from their former machine consciousness still haunt these cyborgs, causing them to suffer severe bouts of depression and anxiety.

name: De-Cyberized
description: These ex-cyborgs have disabled or cast off the augments which had once been forced upon them, reclaiming many of their species' organic, inherited attributes.

name: Neuro-Calmed
description: These cyborgs have their Neuroxene levels downregulated, reducing impulsivity and aggression, driving individuals to de-prioritize personal gain in favor of societal norms.

name: Neuro-Savant
description: These cyborgs have their Cognivex levels upregulated, enhancing synaptic plasticity, information retention, and problem-solving abilities.

name: Regen-Optimized
description: These cyborgs have their Regenol-X levels upregulated, harmonizing biological and synthetic systems, allowing cybernetic implants to self-repair at the molecular level.

name: Tankbound
description: This species lives out its existence suspended in a vat of specialized bio-fluids. As such, they are heavily reliant on assistive equipment and incapable of engaging directly in physical work.
effects: Cannot occupy Worker Jobs  - Cannot be recruited in Armies | planet_pops_food_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; pop_amenities_usage_mult: +50.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -25.0%

name: Uncanny Intuition
description: This species exhibits an inexplicable ability to navigate through complex problems on its first attempt.

name: Cranial Hypertrophy
description: The frame of this species' neural encasement has inflated to the point where its physical capabilities have become somewhat limited.

name: Cranial Megatrophy
description: The frame of this species' neural encasement has inflated to its ultimate biological limit.

name: Haunting Visions
description: Entities from other dimensions send maddening visions into the minds of this species, affecting their ability to perform complex tasks.

name: Blind
description: Where we are going, we won't need [Species.GetEyeNamePlural] to see.

name: Marked
description: In a gruesome display of devotion, this species has branded its flesh with the mark of 'The End'.
